title: Formal Theory Note Library
purpose: Bridge an external formal-theory note library into AITP L2 without treating the backend root as canonical truth.
Seed concept, derivation_object, bridge, and warning_note candidates from human-maintained theory notes.
artifact_granularity: One formal-theory note or one derivation-focused note is the atomic reusable backend artifact.
retrieval_hints: Prefer note-local definitions, equations, lemmas, and derivation skeletons before requesting new summary prose.
When a backend note materially shapes L1, L3, or L4, register that concrete note into L0 first.
Do not infer canonical ontology from folder names alone; ontology must be written explicitly during L2 promotion.
notes: This is a public example card for external formal-theory backends such as a standalone theoretical-physics knowledge network or local derivation-note vault.
